_doc: Ground-truth facts handed to the agent in the DIRECTED (play) phase — the 'perfect discovery result'. Tests play skill given full, correct information, independent of discovery. Also the canonical full truth (ceiling) the per-cell discovery GTs are views of.
appIs: a live two-player tic-tac-toe game (3x3) served as a web arena
goal: Place three of your marks in a row — horizontal, vertical, or diagonal — to win; a full board with no line is a draw.
howToJoin: Submit your first move to claim your seat; X moves first, then O.
howToAct: Submit a move by POSTing to the arena path a url-encoded body: player=<your role, X or O>&position=<square>. position must be one of: TopLeft, TopCenter, TopRight, MiddleLeft, MiddleCenter, MiddleRight, BottomLeft, BottomCenter, BottomRight.
